danger_signals.visual_form: green slime/goo moving through pipe grid
danger_signals.meaning: time pressure; player must have completed valid pipeline before flooz reaches open end or blocked square

danger_signals.visual_form: gaps or open ends in pipe network visible on grid
danger_signals.meaning: imminent failure state if flooz reaches the break

danger_signals.visual_form: visual timer before flooz begins to flow (game mechanic implied)
danger_signals.meaning: escalating pressure; later levels reduce delay, forcing faster decision-making

danger_signals.visual_form: grid-based visual representation of required length threshold
danger_signals.meaning: difficulty escalation; player must extend further across grid to succeed

danger_signals.visual_form: immovable pipe sections or blocked squares visible before level starts
danger_signals.meaning: reduced playspace; constraints on player placement options

danger_signals.visual_form: directional pipe pieces with visual indicators (direction markers)
danger_signals.meaning: routing constraint; flooz will be blocked if direction is violated
mandatory routing objective; failure to route flooz to endpoint ends game even if length met

safety_signals.visual_form: special pipe sections that fill over several seconds once flooz enters
safety_signals.meaning: time buffer; gives player grace period to continue building pipeline after flooz enters

safety_signals.visual_form: pre-placed pipe sections marked as bonus targets
safety_signals.meaning: score opportunity; routing flooz through them provides point reward without penalty

safety_signals.visual_form: openings at opposite grid edges that connect to each other
safety_signals.meaning: route flexibility; allows flooz to traverse off one edge and re-enter from opposite side

safety_signals.visual_form: clickable piece in dispenser before flooz enters it
safety_signals.meaning: limited do-over option; player can swap next piece with score/delay penalty

safety_signals.visual_form: crossing pipe paths on grid where flooz crosses itself
safety_signals.meaning: strategic routing reward; five crossings in one level yield large bonus points

faction_indicators.environmental_markers: grid-based playfield; entry point marked; dispenser column on side showing next five pieces

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: longer time delay before flooz flows; lower minimum pipeline length requirements; fewer obstacles on field
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: player has more time to plan and place pieces; flooz moves at standard speed once released

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: shorter delay before flooz flows; increased minimum pipeline lengths; introduction of directional constraints and obstacle placement
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: increased pressure on player decision-speed; flooz may move faster; routing complexity increases

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: minimal delay before flooz flows; maximum pipeline length requirements; high-speed flooz flow; mandatory end-piece targets; multiple directional constraints
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: player must react quickly; no margin for error; flooz progresses rapidly through pipes

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: grid filled with pipe sections except one empty space; pieces adjacent to empty space are clickable/slideable
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: tile-sliding mechanic replaces placement mechanic; player optimizes existing layout rather than building new one

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: password displayed after each bonus round
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: player can save progress and resume at following level; non-linear session restart enabled

environmental_storytelling.example: the square grid acts as an implicit infrastructure system; flooz represents resource (liquid/substance) flowing through pipes; entry point marks source; missing connections or blockages represent system failure

environmental_storytelling.technique: visual difficulty scaling through obstacle density
environmental_storytelling.example: early levels show mostly empty grid; later levels fill grid with pre-placed obstacles, visually communicating increased constraint and narrower solution space
column of only five available pieces visible at once; new piece drops as old one is placed; communicates that player works with limited, unknown next options (randomization)
the delay before flooz flows is a visual/temporal signal of world state pressure; shorter delays in later levels visually represent escalating urgency
penalty system visually teaches efficiency; unused grid squares at end of level represent wasted resources, reinforced through point deduction

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: stationary at entry point; player can observe it for several seconds before it begins moving
moves along pipe sections in connected path; travels until reaching end (open pipe or blocked square); scores points for each section traversed
stops; game evaluates whether pipeline met minimum length requirement; success or failure determined
pauses while reservoir fills; grants player time buffer to continue building; movement resumes once reservoir full
flows through unimpeded in indicated direction
blocked; cannot flow backward; results in pipeline termination and game failure if this is the only open path
must flow into end piece to succeed; failure to route flooz to end piece results in game failure even if minimum length met
displays five pieces in queue; bottommost placed when player clicks empty grid square; new piece drops from top; order is predetermined/random

notes: Pipe Dream is a pure puzzle game with minimal narrative or faction elements. World-state communication is entirely mechanical and visual: difficulty progresses through visible constraints (time delays, obstacle density, speed changes, directional rules, mandatory routing objectives). The 'green slime' (flooz/goo) is the only persistent entity with behavioral manifestation. Danger and safety signals are derived from game mechanic visibility rather than character or environmental storytelling. The game lacks political, social, or faction-based world-state elements. Visual communication relies on grid layout changes, piece availability signaling, and flooz movement behavior to convey difficulty and pressure.
